bias.analyst: The climb continues - first resistance broke on genuine buying and momentum finally cleared its gate. The whole book is ratcheting upward behind price: support layers keep leapfrogging each other while the overhead wall quietly adds size. Theo still refuses the entry: the day-type verdict is minutes away, this exact look was a trap at the open, and the math into the wall is under two-to-one. The setup worth taking forms AFTER the verdict - a pullback to the broken level that holds, confirmed, with room to run.
bias.commentator: Theo's side breaks the first line in OPEN PLAY this time - crowd on its feet! But the manager holds the strikers AGAIN, and he's pointing at three things: the ref's about to blow the whistle that sets the game plan, that same run got counter-trapped at kickoff, and the away bus just got HEAVIER at the next line. 'We attack after the whistle, off a clean reset.' Nerves of steel on this touchline!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
